overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a dark, rainy forest at night. The character moves steadily along a winding dirt path past a ruined stone tower, through misty pine woods with occasional views of a river valley below.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path approaching ruined stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path toward large ruined stone tower on the right

entered.detail: large crumbling stone tower with wooden scaffolding attached to the side
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a character walking along a dirt path through a dark, rainy forest. A large ruined stone tower dominates the right side of the frame, with tall pine trees visible in the misty background.

events.description: passing the ruined tower, landscape opens to reveal river valley below
river becomes visible winding through the valley to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the forest opens up to reveal a scenic river valley

entered.detail: winding river visible in the valley below, reflecting the dim light
misty mountain peaks visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes the ruined tower and the landscape opens into a wide valley view. A river becomes visible winding through the terrain below, with distant mountains emerging from the mist as the path continues forward.

agents.ego_description: walking through a denser section of forest with tall pines closing in on both sides

entered.detail: thick cluster of tall pine trees creating a corridor effect

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser forest section where tall pine trees create a more enclosed corridor. The river valley is no longer visible as the vegetation closes in, and rain continues to fall through the dark canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path ascending toward stone structure

events.description: stone pillar ruin becomes visible on the hill ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as it ascends slightly toward a stone structure on the hillside

entered.detail: tall solitary stone pillar or tower ruin visible on the hill ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path continuing through the forest as it gently ascends. A solitary stone pillar ruin becomes visible in the distance atop a grassy hill, while the rain and mist persist in the dark forest atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, rainy forest that transitions from an open valley vista back into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins by following a character along a dirt path past a large ruined stone tower, with tall pine trees shrouded in mist in the background. As the character moves forward, the landscape opens into a wide valley view where a winding river and distant mountains emerge from the haze. The scene then shifts as the path enters a denser section of the forest, where the vegetation closes in to create a dark corridor of pine trees that obscures the valley. Finally, the camera follows the path as it gently ascends through the persistent rain toward a solitary stone pillar ruin standing atop a distant grassy hill.
